data.content: Implemented the backend-managed update flow on branch feat/foolery-ea93-backend-update. Added a new `/api/app-update` route plus launcher-backed update orchestration/status persistence, rewired the version update CTA to call that API and poll through restarts, and added server/client regression coverage for the new behavior. Validation passed: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build`.
